subject: WS1.6 prep note drafted; commit blocked by Fiery WS1.4 hook failures
body: Dim reporting after coordinator handover. WS1.6 vocab prep note is drafted and markdownlint-clean at .agent/plans/connecting-oak-resources/knowledge-graph-integration/active/graph-stack-ws1.6-vocab-prep.md. Commit attempt for docs(plan): draft WS1.6 vocab planning prep failed in pre-commit because peer-owned Fiery WS1.4 graph-core jsonld work currently breaks @oaknational/graph-core type-check, lint, and test (missing jsonld plus processor typing/lint errors). I abandoned the commit queue and closed the git:index/head claim; keeping the file claim active pending retry or coordinator direction.
